name: Cloquet Transit Co

name: Lincoln Coach Lines

notes: Input lists 'Lincoln Coach Lines' at 340 Poplar St Hanover PA — this is the trading name/DBA of Lincoln Bus Lines, Inc. (and Lincoln Tours Bus Lines Inc) at the same address. SAFER carrier USDOT 10648 is INACTIVE; last MCS-150 filed 2012-08-24. Charter/tour operations acquired by Wolf's Bus Lines (York Springs) on 2015-05-01. School bus operations continued; Pennsylvania Coach Lines (McKeesport, USDOT 465361) reportedly invested. Founded 1947 by N. Dale Lightner; still associated with Lightner family. PA SOS direct portal returned 403, so entity status not verified live.

name: Fullington
inc_date: 1908 (Fullington Auto Bus Company founded by Emerson M. Fullington; school bus LLC and Trailways LLC are later entity restructurings)
entity_status: Active (PA SOS direct lookup blocked; Fullington Trailways LLC also registered as foreign LLC in NY DOS #3487725, filed 2007-03-12, indicating PA-formed parent)
registry_source: PA Department of State business entity search (file.dos.pa.gov direct portal blocked HTTP 403); NY DOS #3487725 mirror confirms Fullington Trailways LLC as Foreign LLC filed 2007-03-12
notes: SAFER FMCSA address shows Clearfield PA headquarters (316 E Cherry St) rather than the input address 121 N Harrison Rd, Bellefonte PA 16823. Bellefonte appears to be a satellite/garage; primary HQ is Clearfield. USDOT 2268876 is Fullington School Bus LLC (243 buses, 237 drivers, active). Related entity Fullington Trailways LLC (USDOT 120909, MC-2796) operates 87 power units and 114 drivers (line-run/charter side) — Satisfactory rating 2025-04-21. Company founded 1908; Mike Fullington has been full owner since Lory & Mike Fullington bought RATP Dev stake back in Dec 2017.

name: Smyth Buss Co

entity_status: Inactive (F. Edwin Smyth & Son, Inc. CT Business ID 0016321, expiration 2021-07-29; last report filed 2020). Smyth Bus operations continue actively per FMCSA and company website — likely operating under a newer/related entity not yet identified.
registry_source: Connecticut Secretary of State Business Records, F. EDWIN SMYTH & SON, INC., Business ID 0016321
notes: IMPORTANT: input lists company as 'Smyth Buss Co' in New York, NY at 123 5th Ave 10003 — but the actual SAFER record (USDOT 245332, MC-247441) is SMYTH BUS CO at 25 Depot Hill Road, Enfield, CT 06082. The NY address in the input appears to be an error (123 5th Ave is a generic/placeholder Manhattan address). Confidence on identity match is medium because of state/address mismatch, but the SAFER name 'SMYTH BUS CO' is the unique national match and is clearly the same family-owned school bus operator (founded 1974 by F. Edwin Smyth; ~150 vehicles per company site; serves Enfield, East Windsor, Windsor Locks CT). Corporate entity F. Edwin Smyth & Son Inc. lapsed in 2021; current operating entity should be confirmed (likely 'Smyth Bus, Inc.' filed separately in CT).
